style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Sandslash's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its metallic surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, accompanied by metallic dust particles drifting in slow motion. A cool, intense blue aura surrounds its body, casting sharp, reflective light that highlights its angular form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
